text:
Once upon a time, there was a curious little bird who longed to soar through the sky. One day, just as it was circling high above the trees, it spotted another bird flying circles high up in the air!

It swooped down low and joined the circle.
*The two birds flew together around an old oak tree. They talked about what they'd like the next time they fly out. Maybe they'll fly out east toward the Atlantic Ocean.

*But that's just what they say when they've finally gotten the big bossbird flying out there. They've been practicing the trick.

*But that was last time.

*Last time they went east. They flew over some farm fields.

*Maybe they'll try that again.

*Maybe not.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
